repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.backend.serverless: AWS Lambda handlers, cold start tuning, event-source triggers with fan-out, per-function IAM least privilege, idempotency keys, and execution timeout limits
tune JVM heap settings for a long-running monolith on a dedicated VM

retrieval_query: serverless lambda faas cold start stateless event trigger fan-out idempotency timeout iam concurrency api gateway

validation_smoke.name: code.backend.serverless L3 validation smoke
signals: handler proven idempotent under duplicate event replay
per-function IAM policy scoped to least privilege
function exits before timeout under load

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.backend.serverless diagnosis smoke
signals: handler stores state in a module global expecting persistence
no idempotency handling under at-least-once delivery
wildcard IAM permissions on a function
function timeout shorter than a downstream call
